Patch Set 1: Code-Review-1

(5 comments)

Rahul, I think this is looking good. It isn't yet resetting all of the files in the ldd but the label is a good start. It should be possible to parse the target index from the label, as well as the target type (OST/MDT) since IIRC there is also a binary flag field that contains the type.

parents.subject: LU-13814 clio: remove last DIO queue usage

commit.subject: LU-18436 tunefs: process to rebuild CONFIGS/mountdata file
commit.message:
LU-18436 tunefs: process to rebuild CONFIGS/mountdata file

Added --mountdata-reset-from CLI option in tunefs.lustre to rebuild
CONFIGS/mountdata file.

Signed-off-by: Rahul Bansal <rahulmay94@gmail.com>
Change-Id: I7652e2afb98536127f6f7ea5fcab243263c04590
Reviewed-on: https://review.whamcloud.com/c/fs/lustre-release/+/58513
Reviewed-by: Andreas Dilger <adilger@whamcloud.com>
Reviewed-by: Jian Yu <yujian@whamcloud.com>
Tested-by: jenkins <devops@whamcloud.com>
Tested-by: Maloo <maloo@whamcloud.com>
Reviewed-by: Oleg Drokin <green@whamcloud.com>
